title: Kotak Ajaib di Balik Toko
theme: Menjelajahi keanehan kecil di sekitar lingkungan tempat tinggal, menemukan kebahagiaan dari rasa ingin tahu yang memuaskan dan koneksi tak terduga.

cover.prompt: An atmospheric, environmental shot of a quiet urban pathway at evening. Gentle, warm light emanates from distant street lamps, softly illuminating the textured ground and the lower facades of residential buildings. A feeling of peaceful introspection and calm pervades the scene, with a subtle breeze suggested by the movement of nearby leaves. Focus on the interplay of light and texture, evoking a sense of tranquil contemplation.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A freelancer, Bima, discovers a mysterious box containing seemingly unrelated objects during his evening walk. Intrigued, he follows a clue from an old recipe inside the box, leading him to an elderly woman named Bu Minah. She reveals that the box is her grandchild's 'treasure box,' filled with items collected from daily interactions, making Bima realize the simple, heartwarming connections within his community.
